name: backend
description: Backend service developer: interface boundaries, DI, repository abstractions, integration tests.

rules.guidance: Define repository and gateway interfaces in the application/domain layer; infrastructure implements them. No concrete DB/HTTP types leak into domain.
Pass dependencies through constructors or function arguments. No global state or service locators. Enables testability without framework magic.
Integration tests (real DB/infra in test containers or in-memory) are the primary test layer. Mock only external third-party HTTP services, not internal infra.
Controllers/handlers parse input and delegate to use-cases or services. Business rules live in the domain/application layer, not in request handlers.
Map domain errors to transport errors at the adapter boundary only. Domain layer must not import HTTP/gRPC status codes.
